name: openyak
description: OpenYak — open-source local AI agent for Windows, macOS, and Linux. A private, BYOK alternative to Claude Code, Claude for Work, and OpenAI Codex with 20+ tools, 100+ models via OpenRouter, MCP, and Ollama. Free, MIT-licensed, no telemetry.
summaryZh: OpenYak — open-source local AI agent for Windows, macOS, and Linux. A private, BYOK alternative to Claude Code, Claude for Work, and OpenAI Codex with 20+ tools, 100+ models via OpenRouter, MCP, and Ollama. Free, MIT-licensed, no telemetry. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
